body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47101", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "LiteLLM prior to 1.83.14 allows an authenticated internal_user to create API keys with access to routes that their role does not permit. When generating a key, the allowed_routes field is stored without verifying that the specified routes fall within the user's own permissions. A key created with access to admin-only routes can then be used to reach those routes successfully, bypassing the role-based access controls that would otherwise block the request, enabling full privilege escalation from internal_user to proxy_admin.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00739, "percentile": 0.49923}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qrc4-49gv-mv9m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T22:47:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrc4-49gv-mv9m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qrc4-49gv-mv9m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47101"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:30:36Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47101", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/2220f3076ac89bd2a2e3439acf57dcfbec2434c9", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/5190bd07eb23a037745d86328096f54378f1614a", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/d910a95661fce3cdd36f3b06c03ecf9c46c6457c", "https://gist.github.com/13ph03nix/9ec616e1fdc77b3673509c60206e827f", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.83.14-stable", "https://huntr.com/bounties/8e75edfb-ff05-4e63-bfca-2d93d03fb3b9", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/litellm-privilege-escalation-via-api-key-generation", "https://www.obsidiansecurity.com/blog/litellm-privilege-escalation-rce", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrc4-49gv-mv9m"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM allows an authenticated internal_user to create API keys with access to routes that their role does not permit", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T22:47:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qrc4-49gv-mv9m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.83.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.83.14"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
